cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The passage is about the 2014 American International Toy Fair. The question asks what we can infer from it. Also, there's mention of high-tech toys like robots and 3D games, and that the trend is big toys with big play value. Now looking at the options: A) Toys are becoming more educational than fun. B) Robots are great favorites of buyers. The text says there were robots shown and Appell mentions robots as part of the trends, but "great favorites" might be too strong. It's mentioned as part of the tech trend, not specifically that buyers favored them over others. C) Big toys will be popular this year.
